name: Vicky Rao
title: Senior Product Designer
summary: Senior Product Designer with 5+ years of experience building high-stakes financial, crypto, and B2B SaaS products from 0 to 1. Proven track record of shipping a live Perp DEX (zkSync) that achieved $25M volume in 60 days. Expert in designing dense, Bloomberg-style trading terminals, leading brand and design systems, and driving product roadmaps through user research and rapid iteration.

experience.title: Senior Product Designer
highlights: Designed a multi-panel trading terminal for real-time price action, liquidity, and execution signals
Developed conditional order flow system and gasless execution patterns
Established scalable design system for real-time market data

experience.title: Senior Product Designer (Founding Team)
highlights: $25M in trading volume within 60 days of launch
Led 0-to-1 product development over 4 months + 18 months iteration

experience.title: Founding Product Designer (Contract)
highlights: MVP from concept to production in 8 weeks
Defined information architecture and core user flows

experience.title: Founding Product Designer
highlights: 50% MoM increase in property manager leads
